caption: The video features a man standing on a stage, addressing an audience with a microphone in front of him. He is wearing glasses and a white shirt paired with a black vest adorned with intricate designs, including a red and black emblem. The background consists of wooden blinds, giving the setting a warm and formal atmosphere. The man appears to be speaking or singing, as he is looking down and slightly to the side, possibly reading from notes or engaging with the audience. The heads of several people in the audience are visible in the foreground, indicating that the event is well-attended. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, suggesting that the event may be related to this organization.
